description:
## Root Cause

`approve_project` reads structured milestone data from `.automaker/projects/{slug}/milestones/` (JSON files). The PM agent generates a PRD as markdown text which gets written to `spec.md`. There is no tool or step that parses the PM agent's PRD output and persists it as structured milestone/phase records into the project data files.

The pipeline has a broken seam:

```
create_project_plan â†’ pm agent drafts PRD (markdown) â†’ âťŚ missing step â†’ approve_project
```

`approve_project` fails with "Project has no milestones. Generate a PRD first." because the milestone data was never written, even though a PRD was generated.

## Fix Required

Add a `save_project_milestones` tool (or equivalent) to the MCP surface and Ava UI tool groups that:
1. Accepts structured milestone/phase data (parsed from PM agent output)
2. Writes it to `.automaker/projects/{slug}/milestones/` in the format `approve_project` expects
3. Updates project status to `prd-approved`

Alternatively, the PM agent execution step could be wired to automatically persist its output as structured data rather than returning raw markdown.

## Correct Pipeline After Fix

```
create_project_plan â†’ pm agent drafts PRD â†’ save_project_milestones â†’ approve_project â†’ launch_project
```

## Workaround

Manually create board features from the PRD content using `create_feature` and wire dependencies with `set_feature_dependencies`. This is what was done for the Streaming Text Rendering project.
title: Bug: Project creation pipeline missing milestone persistence step

descriptionHistory.description:
## Root Cause

`approve_project` reads structured milestone data from `.automaker/projects/{slug}/milestones/` (JSON files). The PM agent generates a PRD as markdown text which gets written to `spec.md`. There is no tool or step that parses the PM agent's PRD output and persists it as structured milestone/phase records into the project data files.

The pipeline has a broken seam:

```
create_project_plan â†’ pm agent drafts PRD (markdown) â†’ âťŚ missing step â†’ approve_project
```

`approve_project` fails with "Project has no milestones. Generate a PRD first." because the milestone data was never written, even though a PRD was generated.

## Fix Required

Add a `save_project_milestones` tool (or equivalent) to the MCP surface and Ava UI tool groups that:
1. Accepts structured milestone/phase data (parsed from PM agent output)
2. Writes it to `.automaker/projects/{slug}/milestones/` in the format `approve_project` expects
3. Updates project status to `prd-approved`

Alternatively, the PM agent execution step could be wired to automatically persist its output as structured data rather than returning raw markdown.

## Correct Pipeline After Fix

```
create_project_plan â†’ pm agent drafts PRD â†’ save_project_milestones â†’ approve_project â†’ launch_project
```

## Workaround

Manually create board features from the PRD content using `create_feature` and wire dependencies with `set_feature_dependencies`. This is what was done for the Streaming Text Rendering project.
